basics.name: Shubham Shrivastava
basics.label: Product Manager & Business Analyst
basics.summary: Product and business analysis professional with 5+ years of experience in requirement gathering, process mapping, data analysis, and cross-functional collaboration. Adept at translating complex business needs into actionable user stories and ensuring successful delivery through strong project management and analytical capabilities. Skilled in leveraging data insights to drive product enhancements and improve user engagement, while aligning with compliance and organizational goals.

highlights: Drove business and data analysis for a Nested Enhancement Tool supporting SWIFT MT to MX migration, expanding field coverage by 160% to align with regulatory standards.
Created end-to-end process maps and Visio workflows to standardize compliance and technology handoffs.
Automated compliance data extraction using SQL and Excel, reducing manual reporting time.
Built Power BI dashboards to track nested transaction distribution, regional patterns, and compliance risks.
Tracked project milestones and compliance KPIs in JIRA, improving project visibility and ensuring on-time delivery.
Collaborated with compliance, legal, and IT teams to align on data field mapping and reporting templates.
Captured and documented business requirements into user stories and acceptance criteria for 12+ product features.
Performed SQL data analysis to prioritize high-value features, reducing low-impact development.
Built Power BI dashboards to track feature usage, bug resolution, and product performance across sprints.
Coordinated UAT sessions and validated 90+ test cases, ensuring system readiness for go-live.
Aligned product release schedule with go-to-market campaigns to maximize user acquisition and engagement.
Documented business and functional requirements for Salesforce migration project, expediting project kickoff.
Queried SQL data to identify and resolve inconsistencies, reducing post-migration errors.
Tracked user stories, risks, and change requests in JIRA, maintaining project transparency.
Coordinated and executed UAT, ensuring timely defect closure and smooth transition to production.
Achieved real-time synchronization of 1 million+ records in under 15 minutes, improving data flow and system reliability.
Gathered business requirements and created process flows to define workflows for hyperlocal services platform.
Collaborated with developers and designers using Figma to align wireframes and reduce design rework.
Analyzed operational data using SQL to identify delivery bottlenecks and optimize fulfillment processes.
Tracked project progress and KPIs in SharePoint, ensuring leadership visibility into timelines and risks.
Partnered with marketing to prioritize feature launches, helping onboard 10,000+ users in the first 45 days.
